title: Preparing execution blueprint

title: Step 1/3: Establish a compatible Next
description: Establish a compatible Next.js foundation for notepad application. Create the root layout, global styling primitives, and any package or config updates required for a clean install and production build. Make the app shell responsive and production-ready so later feature work lands on stable scaffolding.
